{{CargoRelic
|name=Art of Ninja
|class_id=20508
|rank=Blue
|affct=CIV
|birthday=05-08
|source=
|description=On May 8, 1676 AD, "Art of Ninja", which would later be considered the Bible for ninjas, was finally finished.<br>The many clans of Yamato ninjas considered themselves orthodox. After the unification of Yamato, Ninja Master Fujibayashi compiled various ninjutsu arts into a book.
|fame=26
|art=28
|fth=28
|civ=48
|tech=24
|ss1=Per 10 Ninjutsu LVLs, Snail ATK +2<br>Ninjutsu Progress: 80/80
|ss2=Per 10 Ninjutsu LVLs, Snail ATK +4<br>Ninjutsu Progress: 80/80
|ss3=Per 10 Ninjutsu LVLs, Snail ATK +6<br>Ninjutsu Progress: 80/80
|ss4=Per 10 Ninjutsu LVLs, Snail ATK +10<br>Ninjutsu Progress: 80/80
|ss7=Per 10 Ninjutsu LVLs, Snail ATK +10<br>Ninjutsu Progress: 80/80<br>Snail ATK +50 (Awakened)
|skill1=[[File:Yamato skill I.png|50px]]Place in Yamato Museum: In Yamato, Snail ATK +20
}}
